===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Olivia Adventures.png|thumb|180px|Olivia in [[Pokémon Adventures]]]]
Olivia debuted in ''[[PASM02|The Delivery of Rotom and the Girl]]''. She was first seen with [[Hala]] and [[Nanu]] at [[Malie Garden]], where they discussed the sightings of the [[guardian deities]] around Alola. They speculated that the normally reclusive guardians appearing before people was a sign that they were angered by something.

In ''[[PASM03|Pokémon Move Specialist Professor Kukui]]'', Olivia and Nanu battled each other to test a stage for an upcoming festival in [[Iki Town]]. Nanu teased Olivia about her romance troubles, which angered her into using a [[Z-Move]]. Nanu tried retaliating with his own, but both were stopped by Hala. The three decided the festival would be used to test Alolan youths by having they battle each other. The strongest participants would travel around Alola's four islands, imitating the [[island challenge]], in order to calm the guardian deities' rage.

In ''[[PASM04|The Decision and the Tournament of Six]]'', {{adv|Moon}} helped Olivia determine the festival tournament roster. At one point, they encountered [[Lillie]], a girl entered in the tournament due to a misunderstanding. When Lillie tried to explain the situation, [[Nebby]] escaped from her bag and ran off. Moon and Lillie chased after Nebby to [[Mahalo Trail]] while Olivia went to tell inform Hala. After returning, Olivia witnessed {{p|Tapu Koko}} rescuing Moon and Nebby from falling in the water before leaving. Olivia offered to have Lillie withdrawn from the tournament, but Moon decided to take her place instead.

In ''[[PASM21|Thieving and Boss Crabominable]]'', Olivia, Hala, and Nanu met at Hala's house, where they decided to name [[Hapu]] the next kahuna of [[Poni Island]]. Olivia and Nanu decided to head to their respective islands to help the [[Trial Captain]]s fend off the [[Ultra Beasts]] that appeared in Alola. Before they could leave, a {{p|Kartana}} and {{p|Buzzwole}} burst into the building and attacked. Hala decided to fight the two beasts alone and told Olivia and Nanu to go defend their islands.

In ''[[PASM26|Adventure in the Dark Dimension]]'', the island kahunas and Trial Captains were revealed to have spent six months on [[Exeggutor Island]] {{pkmn|training}} to prepare for another clash with the Ultra Beasts. At some point, Olivia made a [[Z-Ring]] for [[Hau]]. Once the training was finished, Olivia and [[Kahili]] left to join the others and deliver a repaired Z-Ring [[Kiawe]]. While they traveled, Kahili revealed a suitcase full of [[Z-Crystal]]s she had spent the last six months gathering. One of the Z-Crystals was a [[Lycanium Z]], which Olivia had never seen before.

After meeting with the others, [[Sophocles]] and [[Molayne]] took everyone to [[Mount Lanakila]], where a wormhole had opened up earlier. Shortly after they arrived, their ship was attacked by a group of {{tc|Aether Foundation Employee}}s and their Ultra Beasts. During the battle, Olivia was assisted by {{p|Tapu Koko}}, who transported her to [[Melemele Island]] in order to battle with {{p|Guzzlord}}.
